text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Satsuki Sho isn't far off. And although I
expected Admire Vega to be locked in and ready,
she seems to have lost her drive.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm reminded of the fighting spirit Narita Top
Road displayed the other day. Could Admire
Vega be feeling anxious?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan encourages Admire Vega to eat well.
She'll need to be healthy to go and win against
the rivals she has to beat.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega furrows her brow. Rivals she has to
beat? Aren't they just obstacles she must
overcome to fulfill her duty? Something feels
wrong about Curren Chan's words...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, the answer eludes Admire Vega,
and the day of the Satsuki Sho arrives. Here, she
will compete against T.M. Opera O and Narita
Top Road for glory.
